description.en: Lift-limited city centres, cross-border handoffs with Belgium and multimodal tickets that can slot UK-exported consignments into wider EU programmes.

keyword.en: Luxembourg city logistics UK export, Belgium cross-border relay Hanbros UK

text.en:
Luxembourg deliveries are short in distance but picky on access: underground loading bays, tight turning circles and mixed French/German paperwork habits on the border. We pair Luxembourg drops with Belgian linehaul when that saves a relay day.

If your cargo never touches Luxembourg, you do not need this page—routing stays UK→Turkey without the detour.
